executive_summary: Test brief: routing, rendering, and delivery are now aligned so the morning lane can carry one crisp leadership scan instead of mixed operational noise.
security_1: Security guardrails and recurring review jobs were added to reduce prompt-injection and secret-leak risk.
security_2: Gateway and health reporting now route into dedicated operational lanes with failure alerts separated cleanly.
tech_1: Slack routing was reworked so briefing, outage, health, and admin updates land in distinct channels.
tech_2: Block Kit templates were normalized into a consistent visual family with cleaner hierarchy and spacing.
msp_impact: Lower channel clutter, faster scanning, and cleaner operational separation for daily decisions.
action_1: Confirm the daily brief lands at the right time for your morning routine.
action_2: Keep outages and failures in their dedicated lanes to preserve signal quality.
action_3: Expand channel routing only after the core set feels calm and useful.
